name: 叙事转译
examples_zh: 帮我把这段短篇小说做成影视开发读本，先做诊断
这是一段我和AI角色扮演的长会话记录，帮我做影视化分析
看看这个悬疑剧大纲能不能开发，找找动机和场景缺口
examples_en: Turn this short story into a screen development reader, start with a quick diagnosis
Here is a long chat log of an AI roleplay, help me analyze it for screen adaptation
Check if this mystery drama outline is developable, find motivation and scene gaps
